message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "BL1 common code" #LightGray
participant "bl1_main" as bl1_main
participant "bl_common" as bl_common
end box

box "arm platform code" #LightBlue
participant "fvp_bl1_setup" as fvp_bl1_setup
participant "arm_bl1_setup" as arm_bl1_setup
participant "arm_io_storage" as arm_io_storage
end box

box "platform common code" #LightGray
participant "plat_bl1_common" as plat_bl1_common
participant "fconf" as fconf
end box

bl1_main -> fvp_bl1_setup : bl1_platform_setup()
fvp_bl1_setup -> arm_bl1_setup : arm_bl1_platform_setup()
arm_bl1_setup -> arm_io_storage : plat_arm_io_setup()
note right of arm_io_storage : register and setup fip
arm_bl1_setup -> plat_bl1_common : fconf_load_config()
note right of fconf : create and populate an\nimage_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
plat_bl1_common -> bl1_main : load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
note left of bl1_main : load and auth image from fip\nwith info from plat_io_policy
bl1_main -> arm_io_storage
arm_io_storage -> plat_bl1_common : FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
note right of plat_bl1_common : use staticaly defined policies in bl1
bl1_main -> plat_bl1_common : image_info
note right of fconf : get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
plat_bl1_common -> fconf : bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
fconf -> plat_bl1_common : BL2_IMAGE_DESC
note right of fconf : set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC\nto FW_CONFIG base address
plat_bl1_common -> fvp_bl1_setup

note over fvp_bl1_setup, arm_io_storage : **load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2**

@enduml
```
